name: All Day Golf Bays
about: All Day Golf Bays offers 24/7 access to golf simulator bays in Waite Park, MN. The facility features two distinct simulator bays, each equipped with TrackMan TM4 launch monitors, providing a comprehensive suite of data tracking. Bay options include 'The Big Green,' a standard bay, and 'The Swing Suite,' a fully enclosed private room, accommodating up to 6 players. Pricing is structured per bay hour with a starting rate of $50 for the standard bay and $60 for the private suite. It is best suited for individuals, groups, and those seeking flexible, on-demand practice and play.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with unique codes for ultimate flexibility
Premium TrackMan TM4 technology provides detailed ball and club data
Two distinct bay options for private or standard group experiences

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) is allowed.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) is allowed.

simulator_hardware.notes: Reliable and accurate launch monitor used in both bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs to use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is BYOB, allowing you to bring your own beverages and food to enjoy during your session.

faq.question: How much time is needed to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For a group of 2, 2 hours are recommended for 18 holes. For 4 people, 4 hours are recommended. For 6 people, 5-6 hours are recommended.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility welcomes families. The simulator bays can accommodate up to 6 players, and the website features images of children playing.
